description_long: This helmet features a menacing, fantasy-inspired design with a glossy black exterior and prominent, segmented purple horns curving backward from the top. The front is shaped like a stylized beast or dragon, with sharp, angular contours and large, red, almond-shaped eye openings. The mouth area is open, displaying jagged, fang-like edges that enhance its fierce appearance. The back of the helmet is smooth and rounded, with the horns being the most prominent feature from this angle. The surface is highly reflective, giving it a sleek, almost armor-like finish. There are no visible ventilation openings, visors, or retention systems, suggesting a focus on aesthetics over practical safety features.
description: A glossy black helmet with fierce, beast-like features and large, segmented purple horns, accented by red eye openings and jagged mouth edges.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmet's beast-like face, red eye openings, and open mouth with jagged edges, as well as the full curve of the purple horns.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the segmented structure and curvature of the purple horn, as well as the profile of the red eye opening and open mouth.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back of the helmet and the symmetrical, backward-curving horns, with no visible facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the segmented purple horn, red eye opening, and jagged mouth profile.
attribute_graphic_design: Abstract, beast-like motif with solid black base, purple segmented horns, and red eye accents; no additional graphics or text.
